page_metadata.biotools__summary: FilterNHP is an R package and web-based application for generating search filters to query scientific bibliographic sources (PubMed, PsycINFO via EBSCOhost and Web of Science) for non-human primate related publications.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FilterNHP is an R package and web-based application for generating search filters to query scientific bibliographic sources (PubMed, PsycINFO via EBSCOhost and Web of Science) for non-human primate related publications.
